findings: Metaswarm commanders default to MODEL="claude-haiku-4.5" unless overridden, conflicting with the premium-model posture.
Launcher metadata/prompt mention premium and banned models, but bin/stampede.sh does not enforce commander --model/--models allowlisting or banned-model rejection.
Metaswarm commander count is capped at 5, but non-metaswarm --count lacks an upper-bound enforcement despite docs claiming a maximum.
SS-250/Depth Guard constraints are passed as metadata and prompt text; the launcher does not validate actual spawned child counts beyond initial setup.
Metaswarm preflight uses stampede-agent, so it does not fully validate commander readiness before launch.
Teardown kills recorded PIDs and tmux session without escalation/wait handling, risking orphan subprocesses; same-run tmux sessions are also force-killed for recovery.
Metaswarm collaboration bus files are created and exported.
Commander launch failures are recorded into swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl for diagnostics.
